rejected_decisions.reason: Issue #1509 recorded available CARLA Docker preflight and a live replay path; the blocker is alignment, not host access.
Issue #1467 showed native smoke metrics can be emitted and compared, so the technical path remains viable after fixture repair.

evidence.finding: Only native and threshold-bounded aligned replay modes are eligible for metric parity.
No existing candidate is eligible for a multi-scenario native/aligned campaign now.
Certified fixture replay status was oracle-replay but coordinate replay mode was adapted, eligible_for_metric_parity was false, and robot spawn projection was 18.19085467444781 m.
Parity report status was unavailable because replay mode/status was not native/comparable: oracle-replay-adapted.
Generated native smoke probe emitted comparable success, collision, and intervention_rate metrics.

unblock_condition: A certified scenario fixture must replay as native with zero unplanned projection or as explicitly aligned with a pre-declared reversible transform and threshold, while emitting comparable Robot-SF and CARLA metrics.
claim_boundary: CARLA lane routing only; not replay parity evidence, simulator-transfer evidence, benchmark-strength evidence, or paper-facing CARLA evidence.
